## User Scenario

Who needs this, and what task should SightSync help them complete?

## Proposed Behavior


## Risk Level

- [ ] Read-only explanation
- [ ] Low-risk local action
- [ ] Multi-step bounded task
- [ ] High-risk context requiring confirmation or refusal

## Safety Requirements

How should the feature preserve visible listening, cancellation, protocol
validation, action allowlists, data minimization, and high-risk confirmation?

## Acceptance Criteria

- Describe the observable pass/fail criteria.
